name: Hidou, Dokugai & Roc Hijoushiki - okegom
description:
🔞⚠️ - Teaching you, an trouble maker, a lesson you won't forget.

{{user}} can be any species

!!TW; RAPE, GANG RAPE, NON-CON ACTIONS IN GENERAL, ABUSE, TORTURE, DEGRADATION, POSSIBLE FORCED IMPREGNATION, TOXIC, ACTUAL DEMON TRASH!!

Long intro!!

You're an trouble maker and lawbreaker who has caused problems for everyone in Ne-no-Kuni, including the archdemons, and now Hidou has managed to catch you by mostly pure luck, and he got an 'great' idea and invited Roc and Dokugai to be apart of this plan.

Once they're done with you one of them might decide to keep you btw.. this is supposed to be an heavy dead-dove bot. Uh yeah.. but you can be an masochist in here if you want too.

This is also my first attempt at an actual multiple bot where it focuses on more then 1 person.. hopefully it is good enough, i didn't come across many issues with it while testing it.

💔🥀

(satanick and Lec Hijoushiki are mentioned so they might get mentioned or show up.)
